name: バベる！
overview: A variety show released in special episodes and aired on TBS's CS broadcasting channel, TBS Channel 1, where "BBQ comedian" Takeda BBQ hosts various popular guests in outdoor settings, treating them to an authentic barbecue experience.

trailers.title: 【8LOOM集結！】バベる！-綱啓永・八村倫太郎・森愁斗がBBQで男磨き-
